name: @stfc-mod-sidecar/desktop
description: Windows desktop companion shell for STFC Community Mod install, update, uninstall, and diagnostics.
author: Joseph Gustavson

scripts.pack: node ../../scripts/desktop-packaging-guard.mjs && npm run build --workspace @stfc-mod-sidecar/core && electron-builder --dir --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:win: node ../../scripts/desktop-packaging-guard.mjs && npm run build --workspace @stfc-mod-sidecar/core && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.cjs
